text:
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub notification of failed Jeeves Daily Pipeline workflow run.
- [escalation] lang.mc@gmail.com: Jeeves pipeline alert for permanent failure with 429 rate limit error in Daily Pipeline.
- [escalation] lang.mc@gmail.com: Jeeves alert that Tavily API usage has reached 80% of June 2026 limit.
- [escalation] Andy: Andrew Lang sends a personal reflective email asking Michael about experiences trying to change or fix people.
- [reply needed] "Larsen, Robert (DCYF)": Robert Larsen responding positively to a whiskey and olives event recap from Michael Lang.
- [reply needed] Zamzar Limited: Zamzar is requesting updated payment details to resolve a failed payment.
- [reply needed] Peter Nordlund: Peter Nordlund invites Matt and Michael to a June 19 Scriptural Reasoning event and asks if they can attend and bring cut-up fruit.
- [reply needed] Barry: Barry shares a NYTimes article about AI in university curriculum that he thought Michael would find interesting.
- [decision required] Zamzar: Zamzar billing service reports a failed payment and requests updated payment details.
- [follow up] lang.mc@gmail.com: Jeeves daily correspondence noting the ongoing Zamzar billing issue requires attention.
